name: Orange-Date Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F. and grease a couple of muffin tins.
Cream the margarine and sugar; add the egg and beat well.
Cut the whole orange into quarters and remove the inner white membrane. Place in a blender and add the orange juice. Blend until fairly fine.
Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
Combine the sifted ingredients with the margarine/sugar/egg mixture, orange blend, and dates.
Pour the batter into the muffin tins.
Bake at 375 F for about 18 minutes.
